subcodes.title: Words to reporter from the San Francisco Examiner, spoken on 1912-10-03
subcodes.first_line: The continent of America is most progressive. The means of instructions are prepared.... Divine civilization is a symposium of the perfections... We do not look upon the dresses of women
subcodes.first_line_orig: اقلیم امریکا اقلیم معموری است.  اسباب تربیت موجود است.  مدارس عالیه دارد و تلامذه تربیت می شوند و تحصیل می کنند
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @universal peace; world unity, @freedom of thought and action
